request_text: Implement the Stage 1 AI Triage MVP hardening and PRD-alignment plan from the user request, including: module-relative static/template paths; password hash verification hardening; codex prompt transport without full argv prompt; server-side preauth login CSRF; browser redirects to /login with safe next handling and 403 for wrong role; local HTMX asset and HTMX filtering on /ops and /ops/board with fragment responses and unchanged view-tracking semantics; strengthen AI triage action validation matrix; initialize system_state.bootstrap_version defaults on bootstrap and worker startup; deterministic documented bootstrap flow with idempotent admin creation; complete .env.example and README; and comprehensive tests for auth, HTMX, paths, triage validation, prompt transport, and bootstrap. Preserve existing architecture and behavior unless explicitly changed.
